# Liquid Liquid Extraction

**Summary**: A method used to separate compounds based on their relative solubilities in two immiscible liquids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] applied liquid-liquid extraction to prepare samples for GC-MS analysis.
